name: spinners
documentation: More than 60 spinners for terminal, this is python port of amazing node library cli-spinners. Find the documentation here: https://github.com/manrajgrover/py-spinners.

modules.name: spinners.spinners
documentation:
Python wrapper for beautiful terminal spinner library.

Spinners are from:
